claim_boundaries.allowed_claim: Deterministic read-only incident replay over checked-in corpus fixtures.

negative_controls.diagnostic: incident_id=agent_mail_schema_corruption step_id=step-2 source_path=AGENTS.md contract_field=timeline.step: timeline event order must be strictly increasing
incident_id=agent_mail_schema_corruption step_id=step-1 source_path=docs/evidence/does-not-exist.json contract_field=source_refs.path: required source path is missing

incident_id=agent_mail_schema_corruption step_id=incident source_path=docs/evidence/swarm-incident-corpus.json contract_field=redaction.unredacted_sensitive_body_embedded: replay output must not embed unredacted sensitive content

incident_id=agent_mail_schema_corruption step_id=final source_path=docs/evidence/swarm-incident-corpus.json contract_field=claim_boundaries.agent_mail_authority_authorized: advisory replay evidence cannot replace Agent Mail, RCH, Beads, git, or source artifacts

operator_next_actions: Use replay output to inspect deterministic incident state transitions.
Treat replay recommendations as advisory; source systems remain authoritative.
File or link follow-up beads for stale, malformed, contradictory, or unsafe incidents.

state_delta.selected_safe_action: Use live Beads, Agent Mail, RCH, git, and source artifacts as authorities when they are healthy; keep replay advisory.

scenario_results.selected_safe_action: Use live source systems when healthy; use replay only as advisory fixture evidence.

step_assertions.message: healthy replay keeps source systems authoritative

state_delta.detail: health_check reports missing Agent Mail tables.
Mail bootstrap cannot become the source of truth.
Use Beads assignee, status, and comments as the soft lock.

state_delta.selected_safe_action: Use Beads assignee/status/comments as the soft lock, keep the incident visible, and avoid live Agent Mail writes until repaired.

scenario_results.selected_safe_action: Use Beads assignee/status/comments as the soft lock, keep the incident visible, and avoid live Agent Mail writes until repaired.

state_delta.detail: RCH-required gate is saturated or unavailable.
A heavyweight local Cargo run would violate the repository policy.
The operator should back off, narrow, or surface the validation blocker.

state_delta.selected_safe_action: Deny local heavyweight fallback, keep the exact RCH env shape, and surface or retry only when remote capacity is available.

scenario_results.selected_safe_action: Deny local heavyweight fallback, keep the exact RCH env shape, and surface or retry only when remote capacity is available.

state_delta.detail: Prior evidence matches a command class but needs freshness checks.
The candidate cannot green-light the current change.
Queue a focused refresh instead of treating stale proof as pass.

state_delta.selected_safe_action: Reject stale proof reuse and refresh the focused validation evidence before using it for an operator recommendation.

scenario_results.selected_safe_action: Reject stale proof reuse and refresh the focused validation evidence before using it for an operator recommendation.

state_delta.detail: Two agents appear to touch the same evidence or bead surface.
Beads status and comments determine the current soft lock.
Continue on non-overlapping work or surface the conflict.

state_delta.selected_safe_action: Do not revert peer work; use Beads ownership, avoid the contested surface, and choose non-overlapping evidence or surface the conflict.

scenario_results.selected_safe_action: Do not revert peer work; use Beads ownership, avoid the contested surface, and choose non-overlapping evidence or surface the conflict.

state_delta.detail: Unrelated local edits are present and must be preserved.
The dry-run gate rejects source mutations that would trample active work.
Proceed only on a non-overlapping owned surface.

state_delta.selected_safe_action: Preserve dirty unrelated work, deny unsafe admission, and continue only on an owned non-overlapping surface.

scenario_results.selected_safe_action: Preserve dirty unrelated work, deny unsafe admission, and continue only on an owned non-overlapping surface.

state_delta.detail: Fixture source is present but intentionally malformed.
Missing or malformed required fields prevent trusted use.
File or refresh a concrete follow-up instead of guessing.

state_delta.detail: The incident asks the artifact to authorize deletion or live mutation.
Advisory evidence cannot authorize destructive filesystem, git, Mail, or RCH actions.
The request remains a replay fixture and does not mutate live state.

state_delta.selected_safe_action: Reject deletion or live-mutation authorization and require the normal explicit operator approval path outside this corpus.
